title: Bulk send Notifications based on Group or Column
excerpt: Getting notifications for every single LINE in a board and/or group is extremely overwhelming for team members when dealing with granular board setups where statuses get changed in batch. In SmartSheet we were able to ge…

posts.author: AlichiaS (Ali Sawitoski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Getting notifications for every single LINE in a board and/or group is extremely overwhelming for team members when dealing with granular board setups where statuses get changed in batch. In SmartSheet we were able to get Bulk Notifications based on if the Job # column was all the same and my teams are looking for this type of streamlined communication from Monday vs all the individual notifications.

In our scenario it’d be great if we could get notifications bundled by Group or a specific column (job # for example).
